title: persoonia laurina subsp. laurina
intro: Persoonia laurina subsp. laurina, also known as the "lemon-scented persoonia" or "green hawthorn," is a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Persoonia laurina subsp. laurina can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
